title: Sales Planner Executive (Pharmaceutical, FMCG)
description:
Job Description:

  • Conduct market research to identify suitable countries for business expansion.
  • Evaluate market demand, competitive landscape, regulatory requirements, and potential distribution channels.
  • Assist in formulating market-entry plans and preparing business proposals or feasibility reports.
  • Support communication and coordination with partners, agents, distributors, and regulatory authorities.
  • Assist with product registration activities, including collecting necessary documents, working with suppliers, and communicating with regulatory bodies.
  • Monitor registration progress, submission schedules, and timelines for trademark registration and renewals.
  • Maintain organized and accurate documentation while ensuring adherence to local import and licensing regulations.
  • Support ongoing business operations, organizational planning, and structural development.
  • Help plan and implement business development initiatives and track product launch schedules and milestones.
  • Manage calendars, appointments, and follow up on assigned tasks.
  • Record detailed meeting minutes and track follow-up actions.
  • Maintain organized filing systems for key documents and communication records.
  • Handle internal and external communications in a professional and timely manner.

Requirements:

  • Diploma in Business, Marketing, International Trade, or related field.
  • Minimum 2 year of experience in Business Development, Sales Support or Product Admin role.
  • Excellent communication and presentation skills

Interested applicants for the above advertised position(s), please kindly email an updated copy of your resume to: gs1@talenttradersg.com;


EA License No.: 13C6305

Registration No.: R23117856 CHOE KIN MUN


For candidate who applied for the advertised position is deemed to have consented to us that we may collect, use or disclose your personal information for purpose in connection with the services provided by us.

postedCompany.description:
TALENT TRADER GROUP PTE. LTD.

Talent Trader is steered by young, dynamic professionals; each of them bringing their own vast experiences from leading Banks and HR Agencies.


We provide efficient talent sourcing, recruitment and retention services that help companies acquire effective Mid-management talent.


We offer the following value-added services for a variety of Mid-management positions across industry veticals such as Banking, Marine, Offshore, Retail, IT, F&B, Education, Manufacturing and Others:


- Talent Sourcing and Recruitment

- International Recruitment

- Contract & Temporary Staffing

- Payroll Services

- Employment Passes
